demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My left side has felt heavy for weeks, but tonight it suddenly felt like a knife was twisting under my ribs, and my nose won't stop bleeding.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The dull heavy dragging feeling on my left side that I've had for weeks turned into sudden agonising pain a few hours ago, and then my nose started bleeding on its own and went on for ages.

symptom_narrative.onset: the heaviness and tiredness crept in over about three months; the sharp pain came on suddenly around three hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: months of feeling run-down, then a few hours of severe pain
symptom_narrative.character: a dull dragging fullness under the left ribs that tonight became a sharp twisting knife-like pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is unbearable — I can't stand up straight, I'm bent over in the chair
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up on the left side of my belly, under the ribs, and it shoots up towards my left shoulder
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started and not letting up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; I'm hugging a hot water bottle to it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving or standing up makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a nosebleed that lasted about twenty minutes and only stopped when I pinched it, drenching night sweats this past week, and I've lost a fair bit of weight without trying
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; I've just felt more and more worn out over the last few months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand upright and I'm worried because I live on my own

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about collapsing at home with no one around

objective_data_offered.value: a nosebleed that started on its own and lasted about twenty minutes, stopping only after I pinched the soft part of my nose; there are blood-stained tissues in the bin
objective_data_offered.timing: started this evening around the same time as the pain
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own account of the bleed duration; not measured

objective_data_offered.value: scattered easy bruises over both lower legs that I don't remember knocking
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-visible skin finding over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: I've been drenched in sweat at night and my clothes feel looser — I think I've dropped several kilos
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-estimated weight change; no measured baseline
